correctionHistory.reason: Useful foundation evidence was collected, but the audit failed because browser validation created Vite dependency-cache side effects and a secondary-source listing entered forbidden generated/dependency/Git metadata areas.
Cleanup was blocked by active PID 64753 listening on 127.0.0.1:5174 from the target directory.

viteCacheAssessment.note: node_modules/.vite/deps/package.json is the generated Vite optimized-deps package marker, not the project package.json.

forbiddenMetadataCategoryExclusion.f0AuthorityFilesCurrentAssessment: Current F0 authorityFilesRead entries are explicit project/source files and do not list source .git, source node_modules, build output, cache metadata, or generated output paths.
forbiddenMetadataCategoryExclusion.historicalIssuePreserved: Original F0 secondary-source listing entered forbidden generated/dependency/Git metadata areas.
forbiddenMetadataCategoryExclusion.reasonForExclusion: Generated, dependency, cache, build-output, and Git metadata paths are not architecture or validation authority.
forbiddenMetadataCategoryExclusion.exactHistoricalFilenamesNote: The prior F0 report did not preserve exact secondary metadata filenames; F0B does not invent them.

implementationSlices.scope: Implement the global semantic token registry from the verified canonical inventory without product UI migration, providers, routes, stores, persistence, or runtime theme behavior.

Implement light/dark/system resolution, no-flash pre-Vue bootstrap, html markers, color-scheme, meta theme-color, preference fallback, system listeners, and cross-tab synchronization without Naive UI provider work.
Install project-owned Naive UI provider/adapters and token-derived theme overrides without duplicating raw values or beginning product UI migration.

implementationSlices.owner: future F3E closure report and browser-validation evidence
implementationSlices.scope: Validate token/theme runtime behavior in a real browser and close F3 after F3B, F3C, and F3D are implemented; do not merge this with earlier implementation phases.

validationRequirements: All F3 implementation phases must preserve F2 scanners and 62 blocking rules.
Do not create automated tests or test scripts.
Run check:tokens first for token edits, then typecheck and build.
Visible UI/theme changes require one narrow real-browser runtime validation with nonblank DOM, no Vite overlay, no console-breaking errors, and an interaction/theme state change when applicable.
No package manager mutation and no dependency changes in F3 token/theme implementation unless separately approved.
